items.name: Kanwas
items.tagline: An open-source brain for your team
items.description: For you, your agent, your coworker and their agent. It holds the team's critical know-how, research, decisions and data. But it's not a dead storage. It's a workspace that makes the context workable for humans as well as agents.

items.name: Shadow 2.0
items.tagline: The work your meetings create, done before they end
items.description: Every online call creates a to-do list. Shadow clears it live. It understands your conversation, tracks what needs to happen, and executes tasks in real time. PDF creation, slide generation, CRM updates, follow-ups, and scheduling before the call ends. Our goal is to have no post-call work. Just stay focused while Shadow handles everything in the background. Starting with core workflows and expanding to everything your calls create.

items.name: Superset 2.0
items.tagline: Run 100s of coding agents on any machine from anywhere
items.description: Run 100s parallel coding agents, offload them to different machines. Rewritten from scratch to support remote workspaces. Share and collaborate with teammates in realtime. Works for any CLI agent.

items.name: pay.sh
items.tagline: Discover, access, and pay for any API autonomously
items.description: In collaboration with Google Cloud, we're building the open source real-time payment infrastructure for AI agents so they can discover and pay per call for any API.

items.name: Gyro Autopilot
items.tagline: 100s of Dollars Could Be Sitting in Your Inbox 📥
items.description: Scan your inbox for unclaimed flight money from delays, cancellations, overbookings, and more. Gyro Autopilot finds what you’re owed and claims it automatically. No win, no fee. No commitment. No credit card.

items.name: Custom Integrations by Databox
items.tagline: Bring missing data into Databox without writing code
items.description: Custom Integrations lets you connect virtually any API to Databox without writing code. Turn API responses into structured datasets and analyze them alongside your other sources to get a complete view of performance.

items.name: Alumni Founder
items.tagline: The tool that maps founder networks for any company
items.description: Enter any company or university and see the complete founder network it produced. Who spun out, how they're connected, how strong those connections are, and how much they've raised - mapped as a live visual graph. Used by VCs for deal sourcing, sales teams for warm intros, and founders looking for co-founders.

items.name: WOZCODE
items.tagline: Cut Claude Code costs by up to 50%
items.description: WOZCODE is an efficiency layer for Claude Code. It helps developers spend fewer tokens, finish tasks faster, and improve agent performance without switching IDEs, subscriptions, or workflows. Install it in two commands and get more value from every Claude Code session.

items.name: Contrario
items.tagline: The AI recruiting platform powered by expert recruiters
items.description: Recruiting tools won't get you the hire. The right team will. Contrario combines a network of expert recruiters with AI agents built for hiring. Our recruiters and agents handle 90% of the work — sourcing, screening, coordination, and closing — all from Slack via natural language. With every decision, the system learns your bar and surfaces better candidates over time.

items.name: Ads in ChatGPT
items.tagline: Create, manage, and measure your ChatGPT ad campaigns
items.description: OpenAI is expanding ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager for US advertisers, partner-based buying, CPC bidding, CPM campaigns, conversion measurement, and aggregated reporting, while keeping ads clearly labeled and separate from ChatGPT answers.
